"Mērķa sasniegšanai tiks veikti šādi uzdevumi:

Apkopot un izpētīt eksistējošus risinājumus ar mērķi identificēt potenciāli piemērotus algoritmus attiecīgiem grafikiem.
•
Izstrādāt pielāgojamu algoritmu, ņemot vērā grafiku daudzveidību.
•

So there are 3 tasks. The question 1: Outlook: Is text organized into clearly separated items in form of a numbered list? It is bullet list, not numbered. So fails. It includes comparison but no validation detail. Might be insufficient. I'd say not complete. So fails. Question 4: Format: tasks are single sentence each? Yes each bullet appears one sentence. So passes. Question 5: Structure: uses infinitive verbs? "Apkopot" (infinitive), "Izstrādāt" (infinitive), "Salīdzināt" (infinitive). Yes. Passes. Question 6: Clarity: short, straightforward, concise? Yes. Passes. Question 7: Relevance: tasks contribute to goal? They cover literature review, development, comparison. Yes. Passes.
